author: Murat
description: AI side panel for vault read&write, memory context, and safe note assistance. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Murat
manifest.description: Mobile-first AI side panel for vault search, memory context, and safe note assistance.
manifest.name: Cancip

name: Cancip

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
- Reworked process tracing into one expandable step with labeled send/receive/action/result evidence.
- Deduplicated repeated model actions while preserving raw request/response audit data.
- Improved exact Vault target routing and prevented unrelated fallback opens.
- Reduced redundant context, tool loops, and mobile-side persistence churn.
releases.name: Cancip 3.1.28

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Cancip 3.1.15：精简按需上下文、能力查询路由、过程收发原文独立折叠与可追溯显示。

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Cancip 3.1.7: acceptance loop commands, structured process feedback, local build assets.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Cancip 3.0.22 adds compact composer change/plan links, layered 24h-first personalization evidence, visible active new-file curation, midnight catch-up daily care, and a Vault-first resource retrieval and self-improvement loop.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
## Cancip 3.0.20

- 发送原文显示真实请求正文；输入字数、token 估算等统计移动到运行与验证。
- 普通模型回答、执行状态、命令、JSON 和原始收发默认折叠；只有明确的 reasoning/thinking 摘要展开。
- 笔记自动补全不再因打开编辑器、获得焦点、切换文件或移动光标而请求 AI；当前聚焦周期发生真实用户输入后才启动。
- 失焦、空文档和无效旧结果会清除候选并阻止后续预加载。

验证：TypeScript、构建、source/runtime 1636/1636、Node 语法、PowerShell 烟测脚本解析、运行时 3.0.20/devErrors 空、过程 UI 短探针、笔记补全调用计数 0→1 均通过。正式长烟测仍受 Obsidian CLI eval 超时影响，未将超时结果记为通过。

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
## Cancip 3.0.19

- 过程记录按可读步骤与技术详情分层；命令、原始收发、JSON 和审计信息默认折叠。
- 最终回答出现后自动折叠过程记录。
- 过程底部显示计划进度、改动文件数、增加行数和删除行数。
- 自动化支持静默运行、专用会话和即时运行状态。
- 自动补全严格跟随真实编辑器/输入框焦点，失焦后停止旧请求与候选轮换。
- 最终回答增加实际执行与验证门，减少空泛完成提示。

验证：npm run check、npm run build、source/runtime parity、node --check、git diff --check，以及后台自动化隔离烟测通过。核心契约长 eval 因 Obsidian CLI 队列 55 秒传输超时未完成，未将其结果判为通过。

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Mobile interaction reliability update: process details keep long raw lines horizontally scrollable with stable wrap/copy controls; Cancip mobile popups distinguish scrolling from taps; context-file editing no longer closes unexpectedly; an empty composer no longer starts autocomplete requests.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
- NoteDraw 的编辑 MD 现可在工作台预览内直接编辑，并永久写回当前原文件。
- 工作台文件、快照与 NoteDraw 控制器保持同一绑定，避免编辑错文件。
- 审核、会话、置顶、自动化、配置与持久编辑层统一从 Vault 规范数据恢复，改善手机和电脑状态不一致。
releases.name: Cancip 3.0.9

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Fix Review Gate navigation after a decision. The dedicated review panel now advances through the complete global pending order across packages, falls back to the full list instead of a partial package list, avoids self-refresh races, and reuses the in-memory snapshot for immediate navigation.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Fix Review Gate device count divergence by using synchronized .cancip/review-state.json as the canonical pending state. Historical package JSONL remains audit-only. Includes regression coverage for stale mobile decision-log reads.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 2.14.68

- 修复 Obsidian 社区审核的静态样式阻断错误
- NoteDraw 画布点击状态改由 CSS 类控制
- 收紧 NoteDraw API 类型并清理 unsafe 调用
- 修复补全设置异步监听器类型告警
- 清除冗余断言、正则转义和 ES2020 Array.at 告警
- 设置页内部刷新不再调用已弃用 display API
- 新增社区审核运行时回归烟测
- 保留 2.14.67 的跨设备审核数量一致性修复

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 2.14.67

- 修复手机和电脑审核数量因本机配置目录不同而不一致
- 审核包读取不再依赖本机 memoryFolder/configDir
- .cancip/config.json 成为跨设备权威配置
- 删除基于本机文件 mtime 的配置优先级判断
- 新增跨设备审核数量不变性烟测

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 2.14.66

- 修复 Obsidian 社区审核中的直接样式写入问题
- 补充与 Obsidian 匹配的 CodeMirror 依赖
- 改用 FileManager 回收临时 PDF 文件
- 收紧 NoteDraw API 类型
- 使用同步审核索引统一手机和桌面审核数量

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Cancip 2.14.64

- Fix desktop/mobile Review Gate count divergence by scanning the complete synchronized package set and using one canonical disk snapshot for the panel and badges.
- Prevent stale asynchronous review snapshots from overwriting newer synchronized state.
- Improve sidebar composer autocomplete triggering, cursor-aligned multiline preview, request lifecycle, and immediate prefetched branch handoff.
- Keep personalized greeting recommendations inside narrow mobile sidebars.
- Improve document workbench preview, editable text handling, NoteDraw integration, spreadsheet rerendering, and mobile status-bar clearance.

Release assets are built and attested by GitHub Actions. Update Cancip on every device before comparing Review Gate counts.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Privacy and author metadata cleanup. Replaced machine-specific paths with portable home-relative paths, made smoke tests vault-configurable, removed personal test fixtures, and standardized the plugin author as Murat. Verified TypeScript, source/runtime parity, bundled main.js syntax, and focused Obsidian smoke test.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
修复编辑器自动补全预加载交接与多行补全布局。

- 选择一级补全后，已预加载的二级候选立即显示并轮换。
- 会话/记忆自动保存不再清空当前补全分支。
- 多行和自动折行补全会为下一行真实内容预留空间。
- 发布资产仅包含 main.js、styles.css、manifest.json。
releases.name: Cancip 2.14.26

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Restored structured process details with Chinese categories for sent data, received data, runtime information, and other details. Raw audit content is preserved verbatim in independently collapsible, scrollable fields.
- Upgraded the midnight memory task to Workflow Optimizer v2: review up to 30 days, require evidence of at least two repetitions, list candidates first, then create and verify only low-risk Skills, subagent routes, or automations.
- Permanently removed the deprecated `Import desktop capability pack` automation and safely migrates the old built-in memory-dream command task without overwriting customized or already-upgraded tasks.
- Prevented stale `.cancip/config.json` data from overwriting newer plugin `data.json` settings during reload; the newer settings copy now wins before both stores are synchronized.
- Preserved the 2.9.19 SR tab repair behavior: no creating `getLeaf()` inspection and no global pointer/touch/click interception.

## Verification

- `npm run check`
- `npm run build`
- Source/runtime parity: 1233/1233, missing 0, extra 0
- Local install verified at version 2.9.20 without changing user settings, TTS resources, extras, or sessions
releases.name: Cancip 2.9.20

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
SR review tab navigation repair:

- Stop using `getLeaf(false)` to inspect the active leaf during SR repair, preventing repeated blank-tab creation.
- Reuse leaf references supplied by `active-leaf-change`.
- Remove document-wide capture-phase SR touch/click interception so native SR gestures and Obsidian tab events are not blocked.
- Keep targeted SR empty-tab recovery and existing PDF return support.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 2.9.2

- Adds guarded new-file curation: new files trigger scanning only, not automatic editing permission.
- Skips clean/cosmetic/Inbox-only notes without model calls.
- Protects templates, generated files, plugin-syntax-heavy notes, and frequently referenced notes from automatic modification.
- Keeps old-file and folder curation in the explicit strong-scope Skill route.
- Includes focused regression coverage for the curation benefit gate and scan pack.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Obsidian Cancip AI 2.8.10

- Rename GitHub repository to obsidian-cancip-ai for clearer Obsidian AI plugin discovery.
- Update README, built-in GitHub defaults, PrimeTTS package URL, and install-command example to the renamed repository.
- Release assets: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 2.8.9

- Fixes Review Gate baseline semantics: old text stays on the last human-written or approved version, while new text tracks the latest unreviewed AI/Cancip change.
- Separates structure-only changes from content changes, so rename/move without text edits no longer appears as a full-file rewrite.
- Adds stronger capture for Cancip command/automation/plugin API vault changes, including delayed Obsidian command writes.
- Extends smoke coverage for repeated AI edits, manual edits after pending reviews, rename-only reviews, and command-triggered review capture.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Based on Cancip 2.6.10 (c49e150). Replaces review-blocking DOM/style/lifecycle patterns with Obsidian-compatible implementations, removes the listed TypeScript and CSS warnings, preserves Vault/clipboard/command capabilities, and updates release assets to 2.7.0.
releases.name: Cancip 2.7.0

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 2.6.10

- Remove timezone suffix from in-chat exact timestamps.
- Keep mobile composer above Android keyboard using visualViewport footer offsets.
- Make mobile Review Gate file tree and diff/detail panes scroll inside a status-bar-safe frame.
releases.name: Cancip 2.6.10

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Cancip 2.2.9 publishes the restored SR/PDF tab stability build. Release assets are main.js, styles.css, and manifest.json.
releases.name: Cancip 2.2.9

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 2.1.1

- Reduced mobile startup payload by lazy-loading PrimeTTS worker assets.
- Included prime-tts-worker.js as a release asset.
- Lowered minAppVersion back to Obsidian 1.11.4 for broader mobile compatibility.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 1.38

- Restored rounded controls inside the Cancip button-edit/settings modal.
- Added a scoped Cancip radius system: controls 6px, cards 8px, panels 10px.
- Kept native Obsidian mobile menu items square while normalizing Cancip-owned sidebar surfaces.
releases.name: Cancip 1.38

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 1.37

- Fixed mobile button sort snapshot scrolling by removing the native Obsidian .menu class from the sortable snapshot stage.
- Reset Obsidian phone menu item corner radii, including first/last/only-child native mobile selectors.
- Kept snapshot-stage scrolling under Cancip control with pan-y container scrolling and drag-only handles.
releases.name: Cancip 1.37

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 1.36

- Make Obsidian note More/menu items square and continuous in normal mode, not only in sort mode.
- Flatten menu sections/groups visually and hide separators so note More menus no longer appear as chunked blocks.
- Improve Android/mobile sort scrolling by adding explicit touchstart/touchmove scrolling fallback in addition to pointer and wheel fallback.
- Detect direct mobile menu-item roots so sorting uses one complete scrollable snapshot list even when the item is not inside a standard .menu container.

Verified:
- npm run build
- npm run check
- Installed and loaded locally in E:/note/.obsidian/plugins/cancip as 1.36.
- Direct Obsidian eval: mobile normal menu radius 0px, group display contents, separator hidden; sort snapshot 45 items; wheel/pointer/touch scroll all moved; handles 45.
- Direct Obsidian eval: normal .menu section display contents, separator hidden, item radius 0px, gap 0px.
releases.name: Cancip 1.36

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 1.35

- Keep Obsidian note More menu buttons square in normal mode, including mobile tappable menu structures and direct menu-item layouts.
- Make menu sorting scrollable on Android/mobile by giving the snapshot sort panel its own wheel and touch-pan scrolling fallback.
- Avoid recomputing sort handles while the snapshot panel itself is scrolling, reducing Android WebView jank/freezes.
- Add regression coverage for mobile menu normal-state square corners and manual scroll fallback.

Verified:
- npm run build
- npm run check
- Installed and loaded locally in E:/note/.obsidian/plugins/cancip as 1.35.
- Direct Obsidian eval: normal menu radii 0px/0px/0px; sort panel scrollable; wheel scroll 180; touch pan scroll 100; 45 inline sort handles.

Note:
- The obq.ps1 queue timed out even for a minimal eval during this run, while direct Obsidian.com eval worked. Smoke through obq was therefore not used as the final proof for this release.
releases.name: Cancip 1.35

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 1.34

- Remove rounded corners from Obsidian note More menu items/groups on mobile and desktop menu structures.
- Fix long menu sorting on Android/mobile by embedding drag handles inside each snapshot row so the menu scrolls normally.
- Keep sort controls above the snapshot stage so undo/redo/cancel/done remain visible and clickable.
- Reduce sort-mode mutation/style feedback loops that caused WebView/CLI freezes during long menu sorting.

Verified:
- npm run check
- npm run smoke = 70 pass / 0 fail / 3 skip
- Installed and loaded locally in E:/note/.obsidian/plugins/cancip as 1.34.
releases.name: Cancip 1.34

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 1.33

- Fix Android/mobile note More menu button rules so mobile menu items use label-guarded menu selectors instead of brittle nth-of-type paths.
- Keep text verification valid for transient mobile menus after the original menu closes by using the captured sort snapshot.
- Remove rounded corners from normal menu items and button settings controls.
- Raise the sort snapshot above the overlay and let it receive touch scrolling so long menu sorting can scroll vertically.

Verified: npm run smoke = 70 pass / 0 fail / 3 skip.
releases.name: Cancip 1.33

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 1.32

- Fix note More menu sorting so long/scrolling menus are collected completely and can be vertically scrolled in the sort snapshot.
- Flatten sorted menu sections and remove rounded/grouped visual blocks during button sorting.
- Add live text verification in button settings and require label verification before applying saved button rules, preventing selector cross-talk.
- Apply UI button rules synchronously to avoid stale delayed apply states on mobile.

Verified: npm run smoke = 69 pass / 0 fail / 3 skip.
releases.name: Cancip 1.32

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 1.31

- Bump plugin version to two-part format 1.31 so desktop/mobile update checks stop treating this as the old 0.1.x line.
- Include the latest mobile button sorting, More menu scroll sorting, rounded-corner normalization, and label-guard fixes.
- Verified with build and default smoke: 69 pass / 0 fail / 3 skip.
releases.name: Cancip 1.31

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
## Cancip 0.1.299

- Added long-press button editing with sibling-button creation from prepared Obsidian command and icon lists.
- Improved UI button rule targeting so generated selectors are unique when nearby buttons share the same class/title.
- Hardened hide/order behavior to avoid affecting neighboring buttons and to work in more Obsidian containers.
- Added floating edit entry fallback for buttons that do not expose a normal menu.

Verification:
- npm run check
- npm run build
- npm run smoke: PASS 53 / fail 0 / skip 3
- strict secret scan: 0 matches

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 0.1.278

- Improves approval/review flow and pending write handling.
- Adds smoke regression framework and approval/review line-delta checks.
- Updates Obsidian plugin release assets for 0.1.278.

Verification before release:
- TypeScript check passed.
- Production build passed.
- node --check passed for output main.js.
- smoke and smoke:full passed.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Review cleanup release.

- Moves dynamic UI rule styles into styles.css.
- Avoids unsafe innerHTML restoration and dynamic style element injection.
- Uses Obsidian configDir-derived plugin/TTS paths.
- Reduces activeDocument/activeLeaf/cross-window review warnings.
releases.name: Cancip 0.1.240

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Mobile TTS highlight alignment and performance fixes.

- Align Markdown/PDF highlight with the floating spoken text.
- Start note reading closer to the current visible viewport.
- Reduce playback-time UI refresh and PrimeTTS prefetch pressure on mobile.
- Improve floating TTS panel drag handling.
releases.name: Cancip 0.1.239

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Persist unfinished-session resume state across stop/failure, reload, history load, stale-running repair, and detached empty API replies.
- Add Obsidian UI button inspection plus persistent hide/show/order rules for active/global/Cancip scopes.
- Add tag listing, pin/unpin, right-sidebar unpinned hiding, and dry-run-first non-pinned tag deletion.
- Tighten UI-rule application so active-scope hiding marks matched elements instead of globally hiding every same selector.
- Built, installed, and reloaded the local Obsidian plugin output.
releases.name: Cancip 0.1.224

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
- Stop/failure state now turns the send button into Continue so mobile tasks can resume from the latest session/tool state.
- Added on-demand session history, active Obsidian view, DOM snapshot, click, and input command-bus targets.
- AI reply links now open internal Vault files/folders through Cancip/Obsidian instead of mobile external link routing.
- Improved built-in PrimeTTS Chinese pinyin routing by converting CJK runs with phrase context.
- Built and installed the release output into the local Obsidian plugin.
releases.name: Cancip 0.1.223

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
- Add a mobile-friendly circular TTS floating button that expands into controls.
- Add PDF/read-aloud entry points in file menus and active view headers.
- Fix previous/next sentence controls to seek and continue playback immediately.
- Fix PrimeTTS speed control to use playback rate instead of resampling, avoiding pitch/timbre shifts.
- Add live source highlighting for readable Markdown/PDF text layers where Obsidian exposes text.
releases.name: Cancip 0.1.222

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Optional local PrimeTTS assets for Cancip. The plugin downloads this package on demand when local TTS assets are missing. SHA256: 0ACE58ED8B192C4E5BD471B0ED78D424107E6175EF83DF3FFFB503785168B3AE
releases.name: Cancip PrimeTTS local package

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 0.1.207 switches the bundled offline TTS package to PrimeTTS v3_4.6M.

Changes:
- Default TTS provider is now auto -> builtin-prime-tts.
- Bundles PrimeTTS v3_4.6M Chinese/English ONNX model assets under tts/prime-tts/.
- Includes ONNX Runtime Web WASM under tts/prime-tts/ort/ so Android Obsidian can run it locally.
- Removes the previous bundled Piper Plus large package from the default output. Piper Plus remains a manual legacy provider if assets are present.
- Adds a reproducible prepare:prime-tts build step.

Size notes:
- PrimeTTS model files: about 19.1 MB.
- TTS runtime folder including ONNX Runtime Web: about 32.6 MB unpacked.
- Full plugin output: about 34.6 MB unpacked.
- Release zip: about 21.0 MB.

Verification:
- npm run check
- npm run build
- node --check outputs/cancip/main.js
- Local install to E:/note/.obsidian/plugins/cancip and Obsidian restart
releases.name: Cancip 0.1.207

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 0.1.206 packages an offline neural TTS runtime directly with the Obsidian plugin.

Highlights:
- Built-in Piper Plus TTS provider is now the default.
- Auto TTS resolves to the bundled Piper Plus package instead of falling through to system/Web/network fallbacks.
- Bundles multilingual model, ONNX Runtime Web WASM, Piper Plus Rust WASM, and Chinese pinyin dictionaries under `tts/piper-plus`.
- No APK handoff, no Android share-sheet reading, no temporary public network TTS, and no mechanical eSpeak/meSpeak fallback.
- Includes accumulated Cancip UX, review gate, memory routing, skill, attachment, and automation improvements since 0.1.178.

Install:
- For normal Obsidian manual install, download `cancip-0.1.206-plugin-with-piper-plus-tts.zip` and extract the contained `cancip` folder to `.obsidian/plugins/cancip`.
- First Android TTS run can be slow while the ONNX/WASM runtime initializes.

Verification performed locally:
- `npm run check`
- `npm run build`
- `node --check outputs/cancip/main.js`
- Installed plugin manifest verified as 0.1.206
- Release zip verified to contain 8 Piper Plus TTS resource files, 115,821,663 bytes total.
releases.name: Cancip 0.1.206

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Cancip 0.1.178

- Review panel changes view now shows only changed lines and supports rendered Markdown diff blocks.
- Old/new review panes no longer scroll independently in the native review detail view.
- Review correction input uses a sticky floating bar while preserving the Android keyboard layout lock.
- Chat tool runs now expose a collapsible changed-file set with open-note and open-review buttons.
- Adds a root manifest.json so Obsidian Community plugin validation can find the manifest.
releases.name: Cancip 0.1.178

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Fix Android Obsidian mobile review panel keyboard layout by locking the review panel height during correction input focus, preventing the second viewport resize from exposing blank space.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Fix Android mobile review panel keyboard layout.

- Reworked review correction input into an in-view form instead of a modal/fixed overlay.
- Removed review-detail :has() and 100dvh layout dependencies that could collapse on Android keyboard resize.
- Added mobile review layout overrides using a simpler scroll flow.

Build assets: main.js, styles.css, manifest.json.

releases.author: arias007

Release 0.1.167

- Improves mobile review and composer UX.
- Includes built Obsidian plugin assets: main.js, styles.css, manifest.json.
